vocab.example: He had a remarkable ability to captivate the class with his storytelling, making even the driest subjects fascinating.
My history teacher’s lessons were always intellectually stimulating, encouraging us to question everything we read.

vocab.meaning: sự ủng hộ kiên định/không ngừng nghỉ
vocab.example: Thanks to her unwavering support during my final year, I was able to overcome my fear of public speaking.

vocab.meaning: ngọn hải đăng truyền cảm hứng
vocab.example: To many of us, she was a beacon of inspiration who showed us that hard work truly pays off.

vocab.meaning: giải thích một cách đơn giản, dễ hiểu
vocab.example: He was a brilliant mathematician who could break things down into manageable parts for those of us who struggled.

vocab.meaning: vượt xa trách nhiệm được giao (tận tâm)
vocab.example: She often went beyond the call of duty, staying after school to help students with their personal projects.
His classroom was built on a foundation of mutual respect, where every student felt their opinion was valued.

vocab.meaning: mở rộng thế giới quan/quan điểm
vocab.example: My geography teacher really helped to broaden my perspective on global environmental issues.
Whenever I felt like giving up, her words of encouragement were exactly what I needed to keep going.
It was his passion for biology that first kindled a curiosity in me about the natural world.
